tool_args.label: Offset Dedicated Bus Lane
tool_args.raw_text: Travel Lane Dedicated Bus Lane & Right Turn Lane: Offset bus lane allows buses to move quickly and preserves parking. Note: Bus Lane is at right curb on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves

payload.description: Offset dedicated bus lane with right turn lane; parking preserved on curb side except at bus stops

tool_args.label: SBS Bus Bulbs / Platforms
tool_args.raw_text: Bus Bulb: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

payload.description: Sidewalks extend out to bus lane, buses do not pull in/out of traffic, higher curbs for easier boarding

evidence_refs.source_quote: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane.
Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic.
Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

tool_args.label: Off-Board Fare Payment (Pre-Payment)
tool_args.raw_text: Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine. Take your proof of payment receipt. Enter through front or rear door of bus – no need to show receipt to the driver.

payload.description: Pre-payment via sidewalk MetroCard machine or coin machine, proof of payment receipt, board through any door

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine

tool_args.label: Curb Solutions proposed
tool_args.raw_text: Metered Parking: Encourages drivers to park just as long as needed, then space is open to the next shopper. Add to commercial areas without meters. Delivery Windows: Commercial Vehicle delivery zones help businesses get deliveries and reduce double parking. 10am-12pm on one side of street, 12pm-2pm on other side of street – preserves critical afternoon parking.

payload.claim_text: Proposed curb solutions include metered parking in commercial areas and delivery windows (10am-12pm one side, 12pm-2pm other side)
payload.description: Curb management solutions to address parking and loading

evidence_refs.source_quote: Encourages drivers to park just as long as needed, then space is open to the next shopper
